findings.title: North Star Metric: Events Processed Per Day
findings.description: The North Star metric for DataPipe is the total number of events processed per day, which reflects the platform's overall performance and user engagement.
assumptions: The number of events processed is a direct indicator of platform usage.
recommendations: Monitor this metric closely to assess platform growth and performance.

findings.title: Primary KPI: Services on EOL Dependencies
findings.description: This primary KPI tracks the number of services relying on end-of-life dependencies, which poses a risk to platform stability and security.
assumptions: Reducing services on EOL dependencies will improve platform security.
recommendations: Implement a plan to migrate services off EOL dependencies.

metadata.measurement_method: Count of services using EOL dependencies

findings.title: Guardrail Metric: Critical CVEs Open
findings.description: This guardrail metric monitors the number of critical CVEs that are open, ensuring that the platform maintains a secure environment.
assumptions: A lower number of critical CVEs correlates with improved security posture.
recommendations: Prioritize remediation of critical CVEs immediately.

findings.title: Measurement Gap: Dependency Health Overview
findings.description: There is currently no centralized view of dependency health across the platform, leading to reactive management of EOL and CVE issues.
assumptions: A centralized dashboard will improve proactive management of dependencies.

evidence.excerpt: There is no centralized view of dependency health across the platform.

recommendations: Develop a dependency health dashboard to visualize and manage dependencies effectively.

findings.title: Experiment Opportunity: CVE Remediation Impact
findings.description: Conduct an experiment to measure the impact of remediating critical CVEs on platform stability and performance metrics.
assumptions: Remediation of CVEs will lead to measurable improvements in performance.
recommendations: Set up A/B testing to compare performance before and after CVE remediation.

summary: The analysis identifies key metrics for DataPipe, including a North Star metric focused on events processed per day, primary KPIs related to EOL dependencies, and guardrails for critical CVEs. Additionally, a significant measurement gap exists in dependency health management, and an experiment opportunity is proposed to assess the impact of CVE remediation on performance.
